title: What this enables
summary: Deck authors get one guarded local loop for text edits, preview, export, and validation.

bullets.title: Author with context
bullets.body: Edit slide text in preview while keeping intent, notes, theme, and constraints nearby.

bullets.title: Iterate safely
bullets.body: Generate variants, compare previews and diffs, then apply one candidate.

bullets.title: Ship with guardrails
bullets.body: Use the DOM gate to catch layout, text, media, and render drift.

resources.title: Runtime path
resources.body: slide JSON, DOM renderer, PDF export, gate
